overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a static classroom scene followed by third-person exploration through gothic castle interiors. The character, wearing a Hufflepuff robe, navigates through stone stairwells, grand hallways with statues, and ends at a large stained glass window room.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic classroom with students at wooden desks

agents.ego_description: static camera observing students studying in the dimly lit hall

notable_agents.action: student sitting at wooden desk reading

entered.detail: tall narrow windows with stone tracery allowing diffused light
rows of dark wooden desks and benches arranged in the hall
thick stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling
hazy atmospheric effect filling the upper hall

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic classroom or study hall with students sitting at wooden desks. Atmospheric fog fills the space between stone pillars while diffused light enters through tall arched windows on the left wall.

events.description: cuts from static classroom to third-person character view in small room
character opens large wooden door and begins walking through

agents.ego_description: wizard character approaches the ornate door, opens it, and steps into the stairwell beyond

entered.detail: large dark wooden door with metal studs and intricate carvings
green metal wall-mounted lanterns flanking the door
blue and gold patterned rug on the stone floor

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to a third-person view following a wizard in a small antechamber. The character approaches an ornate wooden door, opens it, and begins moving into a stone stairwell beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic stone stairwell with wooden banisters

events.description: character begins descending the spiral wooden staircase
passing by tall gothic window with bright exterior light

agents.ego_description: character walks down the wooden staircase, passing stone walls and tapestries

entered.detail: ornate wooden stairs with carved banisters winding downward
dark wood paneling on lower walls with stone above
narrow arched window with bright light streaming through
large decorative tapestry depicting a forest scene

segments.scene_description: The character descends a gothic stone stairwell with ornate wooden banisters. Light streams through tall gothic windows as the character passes tapestries and carved wood paneling on the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hallway with statues and marble floors

events.description: exits narrow stairwell into wide grand hallway with arched ceilings
passes another student carrying a yellow cage in the hallway

agents.ego_description: character walks through the grand hallway passing marble busts and suits of armor

notable_agents.action: student carrying a yellow cage walks past the character

entered.detail: wide corridor with high arched ceilings and marble flooring
classical marble busts on pedestals along the walls
full suit of medieval armor standing in an alcove
ornate hanging light fixture in the center of the hallway

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a grand hallway with marble floors and high arched ceilings. The space is lined with classical busts and suits of armor. The character passes another student carrying a cage before continuing toward a large arched doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular room with large stained glass window

events.description: enters circular room dominated by large stained glass window
character slows and approaches the large double doors at the far end

agents.ego_description: character walks toward the ornate double doors while passing wall tapestries

entered.detail: massive arched window with intricate green and blue glass design
large wooden double doors with metal detailing and handles
decorative fabric hangings between marble wall panels
large green plants in pots flanking the doorway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a circular room illuminated by a massive stained glass window depicting a tree. The marble floor features geometric patterns, and wall tapestries hang between ornate panels. The character approaches a set of large wooden double doors at the far end of the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a quiet, atmospheric classroom into the expansive, ornate depths of a gothic castle. It begins with a static view of students at wooden desks amidst stone pillars and diffused light, before the perspective shifts to follow a wizard through a small antechamber and through an ornate wooden door. As the character descends a stone stairwell, the environment transitions from enclosed hallways to open spaces, passing carved wood paneling and tapestries illuminated by streaming window light. The scene then expands into a grand marble hallway lined with classical busts and suits of armor, moving past another student toward a large arched doorway. Finally, the camera enters a circular room dominated by a massive stained glass window of a tree, gliding across geometric marble floors toward a set of large wooden double doors.
